zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Knightley Of Fawsley於1395年出生在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Knightley31歲，母親Joan De Chillington27歲。他於1415年與Elizabeth Purefoy在英國萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1416年住在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利。他於1420年被列為member of parliament for northamptonshire~~source, please. thanks!。他去世於1442年12月19日在英國諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Knightley Of Fawsley于1395年出生在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Knightley31岁，母亲Joan De Chillington27岁。他于1415年与Elizabeth Purefoy在英国萊希斯特斯爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1416年住在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利。他于1420年被列为member of parliament for northamptonshire~~source, please. thanks!。他去世于1442年12月19日在英国諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾法福斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Knightley Of Fawsley was born in 1395, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Knightley, was 31 and his mother, Joan De Chillington, was 27. He married Elizabeth Purefoy in 1415, in Drayton, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom in 1416. In 1420, at the age of 25, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for northamptonshire~~source, please. thanks!. He died on 19 December 1442, in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Knightley Of Fawsley est né en 1395, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Knightley, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan De Chillington, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Purefoy en 1415, à Drayton, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1416. En 1420, à l’âge de 25 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for northamptonshire~~source, please. thanks!. Il est décédé le 19 décembre 1442, à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Knightley Of Fawsley 1395 in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Knightley 31 und seine Mutter Joan De Chillington 27. Er hat 1415 in Drayton, Leicestershire, England Elizabeth Purefoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1416 hat er in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. 1420, als er 25 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament for northamptonshire~~source, please. thanks! aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. Dezember 1442 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Knightley Of Fawsley è nato il nel 1395 nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Knightley, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan De Chillington, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Purefoy nel 1415, nel Drayton, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1416. Nel 1420, all'età di 25 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for northamptonshire~~source, please. thanks!. Morì il 19 dicembre 1442, nel Fawsley, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Knightley Of Fawsleyが1395年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Knightleyは31歳，母Joan De Chillingtonは27歳であった。1415年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアドレイトンでElizabeth Purefoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1416年にはイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーに住んでいた。1420年，25歳の時，職業はmember of parliament for northamptonshire~~source, please. thanks!と記録されている。彼は1442年12月19日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアファウスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Knightley Of Fawsley(이)가 1395년 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Knightley(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan De Chillington(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1415년 영국 레이스스터실르 드라이턴에서 Elizabeth Purefoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1416년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에서 살았다. 1420년, 25세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament for northamptonshire~~source, please. thanks!이었다. 그는 1442년 12월 19일 영국 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 파w슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Knightley Of Fawsley nasceu em 1395, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Knightley, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan De Chillington, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Purefoy em 1415, em Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1416. Em 1420, com 25 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for northamptonshire~~source, please. thanks!. Ele faleceu em 19 de dezembro de 1442, em Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Knightley Of Fawsley родился в 1395 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Knightley было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan De Chillington, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Purefoy в 1415 г. в местности дреитон, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в 1416 году. В 1420 году, в возрасте 25 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament for northamptonshire~~source, please. thanks!. Он умер 19 декабря 1442 г. в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности фавсли, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Knightley Of Fawsley nació en 1395, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Knightley, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan De Chillington, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Purefoy en 1415, en Drayton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1416. En 1420, a la edad de 25 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament for northamptonshire~~source, please. thanks!. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1442, en Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Fawsley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
